query: motion blur photograph long exposure subject in motion
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: motion blur, long exposure subject motion - artistic streaks and dynamic blur

response.objective_caption: A black and white photograph of a person standing near a window covered with horizontal blinds. Strong backlight from the window silhouettes the figure against a bright background. The individual faces away from the camera, wearing dark clothing, while interior details remain obscured by shadow.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A black and white photograph with severe horizontal motion blur showing a silhouetted figure near window blinds. Extreme exposure contrast creates blown-out highlights and crushed black shadows, while the motion blur smears textures and details into indistinct streaks, dissolving the subject into a dynamic, gestural form that lacks fine detail.
